title: Ghast2D
description: Changes ghast model to a 2D variant. Works in vanilla by using internal shaders!
body:
Pack changes vanilla ghast (not happy ghast) model to 2D version with textures by [Mickey Joe](https://modrinth.com/user/mushirmickeyjoe).

Works in vanilla Minecraft, NO MODS like OptiFine requires!
Uses internal shaders to make the Ghast appear two-dimensional, kind of like Doom's Cacodemons

## Dartcat25 x Mickey Joe

![The Counsil shall decide your faith](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SQGqshB8/images/64b5badf7d84a03005eca28dfd47fd4e3eec9102.png)

also...
